name: HAT (Humanoid Policy ~ Human Policy)
source_datasets: PH2D (Physical Human-Humanoid Data, own egocentric capture)
downloadable: open (MIT), but language lives inside HDF5 episode attributes
suitability: download+cluster candidate, documented descriptively this run: the corpus is open, but per-demo task-instruction text is embedded as attributes inside 957 HDF5 episode shards (video plus 3D hand pose), not a standalone text file, so extracting it needs bulk HDF5 download
focus_en: An open egocentric human-demonstration corpus (PH2D) with per-demo task instructions and 3D hand poses, co-trained with a Human Action Transformer via differentiable retargeting.
focus_cn: 一个开放的第一人称人类演示语料库（PH2D），包含每条演示的任务指令与三维手部姿态，并通过可微重定向与人类动作 Transformer 协同训练。
datapath_en: HAT collects PH2D, about 27,000 egocentric human demonstrations captured with consumer head-mounted devices, each labeled with a task instruction and paired with 3D hand poses. It co-trains a Human Action Transformer on human plus a small amount of humanoid-robot data, using differentiable human-to-robot retargeting so one policy serves both. The PH2D release is open under MIT, but the instruction text is stored as attributes inside HDF5 episode files rather than a standalone annotation table.
datapath_cn: HAT 采集了 PH2D，约 27,000 条用消费级头戴设备采集的第一人称人类演示，每条都带有任务指令并配有三维手部姿态。它在人类数据加少量人形机器人数据上协同训练人类动作 Transformer，并通过可微的人到机器人重定向使同一策略兼用于两者。PH2D 以 MIT 许可开放，但指令文本以属性形式存储在 HDF5 片段文件中，而非独立的标注表。
flow_cn: 第一人称人类演示（头戴采集）
任务指令 + 三维手部姿态（HDF5）
可微的人到机器人重定向
协同训练的人类动作 Transformer
no_corpus_en: PH2D is openly licensed (MIT) and is a genuine download+cluster candidate. This run documents it descriptively because the per-demo task-instruction strings are embedded as attributes inside 957 HDF5 episode shards (each carrying video and 3D hand pose), so pulling the language alone requires a bulk HDF5 download rather than a small text file. A future run can extract and cluster the instructions.
no_corpus_cn: PH2D 采用开放许可（MIT），是名副其实的下载并聚类候选。本次以描述性方式记录，是因为每条演示的任务指令字符串以属性形式嵌入在 957 个 HDF5 片段（每个都含视频与三维手部姿态）中，因此单独提取语言需要批量下载 HDF5，而非一个小型文本文件。后续运行可提取并聚类这些指令。
example_credit: HAT / PH2D, Qiu et al., CoRL 2025 (MIT).
example_caption_en: PH2D collects egocentric human demonstrations with task instructions and 3D hand poses; the project overview is shown.
example_caption_cn: PH2D 采集带任务指令与三维手部姿态的第一人称人类演示；此处显示项目概览图。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2503.13441, github.com/RogerQi/human-policy, and the HuggingFace dataset RogerQi/PH2D (957 HDF5 shards, MIT).
citation: Qiu et al., Humanoid Policy ~ Human Policy, CoRL 2025 (arXiv:2503.13441).
